principles: No hard-coupling: everything behind adapters + settings_scoped toggles.
Libraries are frontend-side; backend stores normalized JSON (blocks/content).

libraries.why: Block-based content that maps naturally to public_site blocks/content_json.
Headless rich-text editor (ProseMirror-based) for terms/contracts/blog; export to HTML/JSON.
libraries.license_hint: See Tiptap docs (open core; ensure chosen packages are compatible)

libraries.why: Visual builder for landing pages/templates; good for marketing teams.
libraries.license_hint: OSS core; ensure using open-source edition (not Studio SDK).

libraries.why: Responsive email templates for campaigns/notifications; compile MJML -> HTML.
libraries.license_hint: OSS engine (commonly MIT); verify in repo.
